response.justification: Maria has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud-native tooling, and open-source projects that align with the role’s focus on automation and scalability. However, her resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, React, or Kubernetes in professional contexts, and her German language skills are only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker)
Strong experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical education (workshops, CI/CD setup)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or React in professional roles despite being required stack
Limited evidence of relational database (PostgreSQL/MySQL) usage in recent roles (focus on MongoDB)
Basic German proficiency may impede seamless collaboration in a German enterprise team
